title: Marketplace Seller Profile
description: Schema for seller or merchant profile pages on e-commerce marketplaces.

top_product.description: A top-selling product entry from the seller's profile.

platform.description: E-commerce marketplace platform (e.g., Amazon, eBay, Etsy). Commonly found in: site domain, platform branding, seller profile URL.

seller_id.description: Platform-specific seller identifier. Commonly found in: seller profile URL parameter, seller ID field, storefront slug.

seller_name.description: Name of the seller or store. Commonly found in: seller profile header, store name display, storefront title.

seller_url.description: URL of the seller's storefront page. Commonly found in: storefront URL, seller link href, profile page URL.

rating.description: Overall seller rating score. Commonly found in: seller rating display, feedback score, star rating.

rating_count.description: Total number of ratings or feedback received. Commonly found in: rating count label, feedback count display, review count.

positive_feedback_pct.description: Percentage of positive feedback. Commonly found in: positive feedback percentage, seller rating details, feedback breakdown.

years_active.description: Number of years the seller has been active on the platform. Commonly found in: member since date calculation, seller tenure display, account age.

fulfilled_by_platform.description: Whether the seller uses platform fulfillment (e.g., FBA). Commonly found in: FBA badge, fulfilled by platform indicator, shipping info.

total_products_listed.description: Total number of products listed by the seller. Commonly found in: product count display, total listings label, storefront stats.

product_categories.description: Categories in which the seller lists products. Commonly found in: seller categories section, product category filters, storefront navigation.

country_of_origin.description: Country where the seller is based. Commonly found in: seller location field, ships from country, seller profile details.

top_selling_products.description: List of the seller's top-selling products. Commonly found in: featured products section, top sellers display, storefront highlighted items.

store_description.description: Seller's store description or about text. Commonly found in: about this seller section, store bio, seller profile description.

business_type.description: Whether the seller is an individual or registered business. Commonly found in: seller type badge, business seller indicator, seller profile details.

page_title.description: Title of the source page. Tabstack auto-fills this from page metadata when left empty.

favicon.description: Favicon URL of the source page. Tabstack auto-fills this from page metadata when left empty.
